user_system_path: Commitment pool hygiene (#537): keep zombie commitments from contaminating the winner pool when professional signal is thin, so tier-descent surfaces a real act instead of a passive counterparty callback. Fix A (this branch): structural external-promisor staleness gate in detectDiscrepancies() — drop counterparty-as-subject commitments that are past-due and stale (>21d no fresh touch) before any extractor runs. Fix B (marketing-sender extraction filter) and Fix C (fuzzy dedup) remain. Every gate change carries a test + before/after read; never blind-loosen, never fabricate stakes to force a card (SAFE_SILENCE stays a valid success).
allowed_files_raw: Allow-by-default-minus-forbidden (friction reduction, owner-directed 2026-06-22). The contract no longer pins a narrow per-seam whitelist that blocks owner-authorized fixes outside the active seam. The real guard is forbidden_file_patterns + the proof doctrine, not a whitelist. Small owner-directed hotfixes (e.g. the Microsoft guest #EXT# email self-heal in lib/sync + lib/ui shipped on this branch) no longer require displacing the active seam.
forbidden_files_raw: HARD RAILS (unchanged by the allow-by-default switch): No Stripe, Scout, schema/migration, or secrets changes. No auto-send. No BLIND loosening of positive_winner_contract or the discrepancy-card quality gate (the #452 'hollow drafts' mistake) — every gate change carries a test + before/after read.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run typecheck (roll-forward); for #537 code work additionally: npx vitest run lib/briefing/__tests__/
required_browser_proof: Live (owner): after the next 11:00 UTC morning-pipeline cron, the Columbia-Motors-style external-promisor commitment no longer appears in pipeline_runs.gate_funnel.discrepancy_candidates_preview for 2cbc1bab; the surfaced card (or honest SAFE_SILENCE) reflects the cleaned pool.
browser_proof_command: manual: after the morning-pipeline cron, query pipeline_runs for 2cbc1bab and confirm gate_funnel.discrepancy_candidates_preview contains no stale external-promisor (counterparty-as-subject, past-due) candidate.
acceptance_condition: Control-plane rolled to #537 with gate:continuity green; Fix A (external-promisor staleness gate) shipped with test + before/after read; stale external-promisor zombies are dropped from the discrepancy pool before scoring. Fix B and Fix C remain open under #537. No blind loosening; no fabricated stakes.
anti_regression_checks: no edits under app/api/stripe, lib/scout, supabase/migrations
lib/briefing suite green incl. the new Fix A external-promisor gate tests
the gate fires ONLY on counterparty-as-subject + past-due + >21d-stale commitments (the user's own imperatives and fresh/future commitments are untouched)
stop_condition: Session-closeout roll-forward lands #537 Fix A on claude/slack-right-now-seed-scorer-zxge0c -> main; gate:continuity + typecheck + lib/briefing green; Fix B/Fix C named as next_seam.
